title: Gym Management System – Project Fit
subtitle: Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas
description: Complete ecosystem connecting an admin panel for trainers, a mobile app for clients, and a point-of-sale system.
features: Web administration panel for users, financial metrics, and subscriptions.
Cross-platform mobile app (Flutter & Dart) for clients to check routines and videos.
Native desktop Point of Sale rendering Vue 3 through the Rust engine (Tauri).
Planned integration with a physical device (turnstile) to automate access.

title: Multi-Company ERP System
subtitle: Furniture Stores (Corporate)
description: Powerful scalable ERP platform for inventory control, resource management, and sales across a network of commercial branches.
features: Modular tab-based architecture with lazy loading for maximum performance.
Agile warehouse stock and inventory capture using mobile camera or laser scanner.
Complete flow: Entries, Exits, Transfers, and Kardex with real-time price updates.
Multi-company operations integration securely managed via Laravel API and Pinia.

title: Strategic Control Dashboard System (SITEC)
subtitle: Ministry of Finance, Chiapas
description: Government SPA platform for strategic planning and long-term institutional goal tracking.
features: SPA development with Vue 3, Vite, and PrimeVue component library for the frontend.
Traffic light system integration to monitor objectives and risks.
RESTful API integration with Laravel for data management.
Creation of parametric catalogs and control modules by six-year terms and roles.
Executive report generation and data analysis.

gallery.caption: Demo video of indicator registration via Excel.

title: Ciam Bela Hair Salon Management System
subtitle: Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas
description: Comprehensive administrative software for managing services, products, and appointments at a beauty salon, with barcode scanning and performance metrics, plus an SMS appointment reminder system.
features: Client-facing and admin panel interfaces using Element Plus components.
Metric chart integration with Echarts and exportable Excel reports.
Mobile barcode scanning for inventory management.
RESTful API consumption with Laravel and global reactive state management with Pinia.
SMS notification system for appointment reminders.

gallery.caption: Demo video of mobile barcode scanning.

title: Project Incubator Platform
subtitle: TecNM Campus Tuxtla Gutiérrez
description: Web system focused on registering, managing, and providing agile tracking for student projects at TecNM Campus Tuxtla Gutiérrez during the incubation phase.
features: Statistical chart integration and customized PDF reports.
Authentication system implementation with detailed permissions.
Relationship management between students, advisors, mentors, and companies interested in investing in projects.

gallery.caption: Statistical charts of students with projects by major.
Email notifications about new project proposals.
